emotional_tone: Weighty, spiritual, cinematic, premium, mysterious yet trustworthy

typography.import_instruction: Import Cormorant Garamond and Outfit from Google Fonts

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Mobile-first vertical stack with glassmorphic cards. Use grid-cols-2 for stats (Hours, Earnings).
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Center-aligned for main player controls (Walk button), left-aligned for stats and ledger.

background_media.instruction: Use a full-screen image/video background with a gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-b from-black/40 via-black/20 to-black/80) to ensure text legibility.

walk_button.classes: w-32 h-32 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center bg-gradient-to-b from-[#D4AF37] to-[#B48E2D] text-black font-bold text-2xl shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(212,175,55,0.4)] hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-300
walk_button.instruction: This is the central CTA. When active, it should pulse.

slide_verification.classes: h-16 rounded-full bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 flex items-center px-2 relative
slide_verification.instruction: Build a custom slide-to-unlock component. It must have a 31-second countdown timer. If the user doesn't slide in time, show a penalty warning.

glass_card.classes: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-2xl
glass_card.instruction: Use for the Ledger/Dashboard stats (G5 Gold balance, hours, streak).

icons_and_assets.instruction: Use lucide-react for standard icons (Play, Pause, ChevronRight, Lock, Unlock, Clock, Flame for streak).

image_urls.description: Person holding staff in arid landscape, acting as a cinematic Jesus walking fallback.
Gold coin to represent G5 GOLD currency in the ledger.

animations.hover_states: All buttons should have a slight scale-up (hover:scale-105) and increased brightness.
animations.pulse: The 'Walk' button should have a continuous slow pulse animation when audio is actively playing.
animations.slide_timer: The 31-second timer should visibly count down with a shrinking progress bar.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text over the glassmorphic background has sufficient contrast (use text-shadow if necessary).
accessibility.data_testid: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., 'walk-button', 'slide-verify-handle', 'ledger-card').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a mobile-first UI with a fixed full-screen background image.
Create a bottom drawer or swipe-up section for the 'Ledger' (profile, stats).
Implement the 'Walk' button as the centerpiece of the main screen.
Mock the 31-second verification slide that appears when 'Walk' is clicked.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for the layout and Shadcn for complex internal elements if needed, but primarily rely on custom glassmorphism for this cinematic look.
